purpose: Stable canonical macro-classification for Armilar price and weight aggregation across source-classification revisions.

categories.label: Food and non-alcoholic beverages
categories.description: Food products and non-alcoholic beverages acquired for household consumption.

categories.label: Alcoholic beverages and tobacco
categories.description: Alcoholic beverages and tobacco within the admissible source scope; narcotics are excluded globally.

categories.label: Clothing and footwear
categories.description: Clothing, footwear and directly associated goods and services.

categories.label: Housing and household operation
categories.description: Housing, utilities, furnishings, household equipment and routine household maintenance.

categories.label: Health
categories.description: Medical products and health services paid within the source price-index scope.

categories.label: Mobility and connectivity
categories.description: Personal transport, transport services, postal, communication and information-connectivity products and services.

categories.label: Recreation, culture and education
categories.description: Recreation, sport, culture, media and education goods and services.

categories.label: Personal, social and financial services
categories.description: Personal care, personal effects, social protection, insurance, financial and miscellaneous services within the source scope.
